price: ein Gesandter von Allah, der gereinigte Blätter verliest,
arabic: رَسُولٞ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتۡلُواْ صُحُفٗا مُّطَهَّرَةٗ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: rasūlun mina al-lahi yatlū ṣuḥufan muṭahharatan
